g.text: Solves: domain knowledge can't be injected

svg.text: Persistent proof state · Layered verification · Parallel search
Orchestrator · proof loop · repair · decompose · codegen · verify

g.text: Total: 85+ Python source files · 12 sub-packages in agent/ · 5 sub-packages in engine/ · 11 sub-packages in prover/
Data flow: Entry scripts → Orchestrator → {HookManager fires events, PluginLoader matches domain, AgentPool dispatches SubAgents} → Engine verifies → Prover assembles
